name: Tomato Relish I
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop green tomatoes and add salt. Allow to stand overnight.
2. Drain the chopped green tomatoes.
3. Chop ripe tomatoes, onions, and peppers.
4. Add the chopped green tomatoes (from step 2) to the mixture from step 3.
5. Add vinegar and sugar.
6. Heat until boiling.
7. Simmer for half an hour, stirring frequently.
Florence Taft Eaton, Concord, MA.
